headline: Software Engineer
professional_summary: Two to three lines summarising who you are, your strongest areas, and what you're looking for. This gets rewritten per job by the AI, but keep a solid baseline here.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built and shipped features used by X users, improving Y by Z%.
Owned the backend for the payments service handling N requests/day.
Collaborated with design and product to deliver quarterly roadmap items.
